name: Gerry Hemingway
abstract: Gerry Hemingway (born March 23, 1955) is an American drummer and composer. Hemingway was a member of the Anthony Braxton quartet from 1983 to 1994.

concerts.label: American Composers Orchestra
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Jane Ira Bloom
about_quotes.evidence: Gerry Hemingway... they all happened to be there at that one time... opportunities to play with like-minded players, and we created a scene there
about_quotes.doc_title: Jane Ira Bloom interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, March 3, 1998
